title: 30 Pcs Green Artificial Eucalyptus Branches,Winter Frosted Lifelike Faux Eucalyptus Stems,38cm Artificial Branches Leaves,for Balconies,Gardens,Christmas Decorations,and DIY Wedding Bouquets
features: 🎁【Contents of the Packaging】You will receive 30 pieces of artificial eucalyptus branches . Artificial Greenery Flowers boast a remarkably lifelike appearance and are available in suitable quantities, making them ideal for decorating domestic settings and creating a romantic and cosy atmosphere.

🍀【Ease of Care】artificial green leaves with stems are maintenance-free. The artificial foliage stems is durable, waterproof and suitable for outdoor use. Even without sunlight, watering and pruning, it is full of green life all year round and will not wither.

✅【High-Quality Materials】The Artificial Eucalyptus Sprigs are made of high-quality plastic, do not lose their colour and are odourless; the stems and leaves are highly bionic. We have also added a thin steel wire in the centre of the stems, so that the eucalyptus branches look more upright and lively and are easier to combine with other flowers.

🍃【Perfect Decoration】artificial greenery leaves decoration are a good substitute for real green plants. They save the tedious process of plant care while providing excellent visual enjoyment; they are an excellent choice for wedding venue decoration, flower arrangement, office decoration, garden beautification and interior decoration.

🍵【Quality Customer Service】If you have any questions or suggestions about this product, please feel free to contact us by email at any time. We will reply to you as soon as possible within 24 hours. If you are looking for gift ideas, home accessories for everyday life or small relaxation items for children and adults, visit the RHQFDM shop regularly!
